# Little Souls

> Little Souls is a pet astrology service that creates personalised cosmic readings for any pet — dogs, cats, rabbits, horses, birds, reptiles, fish, and more. Each reading uses the pet's birth date, name, photo, and personality observations to generate a 30+ section interactive web experience that helps owners understand their pet's soul, decode emotions, and transform the bond forever.

Little Souls was created for pet owners who have always felt their pet is trying to tell them something. Readings are delivered within 5–10 minutes as a permanent, shareable web experience (not a PDF).

**Average customer rating: 4.9 / 5 stars across 71 verified reviews.**

## What Little Souls offers

- **Little Souls Reading ($29)** — A 30+ section personalised cosmic reading based on birth chart, elemental balance, archetype, compatibility, lucky elements, name meaning, and more.
- **Soul Bond Edition ($49)** — Everything in the Reading plus a cosmic artistic portrait card of the pet, and a deep pet-parent compatibility analysis between the owner's chart and the pet's.
- **SoulSpeak** — After receiving a reading, owners can chat directly with their pet's cosmic soul. The voice is grounded in the pet's chart placements and the owner's own observations, so each conversation feels specific to that pet. Included with every reading.
- **Memorial Readings** — A separate, grief-aware reading for beloved pets who are no longer at the owner's side. Written reverently, never playfully. The memorial product is priced the same as Soul Bond ($49).
- **Gift Certificates** — Purchasable and redeemable at checkout.
- **Weekly Horoscopes** — Optional subscription with weekly cosmic guidance for any pet.
- **Affiliate Program** — 50% commission on referred sales.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://littlesouls.app): overview of Little Souls, testimonials, sample readings
- [Start a Reading](https://littlesouls.app/): choose reading tier and begin the intake
- [Gift a Reading](https://littlesouls.app/gift-v2): send a reading as a gift certificate
- [Blog](https://littlesouls.app/blog): pet astrology, behaviour, memorial, and SoulSpeak articles written by named expert authors
- [Redeem a Code](https://littlesouls.app/redeem): enter a redeem code or gift certificate
- [Affiliates](https://littlesouls.app/become-affiliate): 50% commission partner program
- [Contact](https://littlesouls.app/contact): support and custom enquiries

## Authors / contributors

The Little Souls blog is written by a small team of named experts, each with their own voice and area. Every blog post carries a byline linking to the author's bio page.

- [Dr. Elena Whitaker, DVM](https://littlesouls.app/author/elena-whitaker) — integrative veterinarian, 18 years clinical experience, writes on pet health, behaviour, and emotional wellbeing.
- [Callum Hayes](https://littlesouls.app/author/callum-hayes) — working dog trainer, 22 years experience in search and rescue, service-dog training, and pet family work. Breed temperament and training lens.
- [Maggie O'Shea](https://littlesouls.app/author/maggie-oshea) — feline behaviour consultant (IAABC), 15 years observation work, cat psychology and feline astrology.
- [River Callahan](https://littlesouls.app/author/river-callahan) — pet astrologer, 12 years practice, 4,000+ animal chart readings. Elemental astrology, birth charts, soul connection.
- [Rowan Sterling, MA](https://littlesouls.app/author/rowan-sterling) — pet loss counsellor, 8 years veterinary bereavement work. Grief, anticipatory loss, memorial rituals.

## What customers say

Verified customer reviews, 4.9 / 5 average:

> "It described things about Buddy that I've never been able to put into words. My partner and I both teared up reading it together." — Sarah M. (Buddy, Labrador)

> "Bought it as a joke honestly. Then I read it and got genuinely emotional. The emotional blueprint section nailed Luna's personality." — James T. (Luna, Golden Retriever)

> "The compatibility chart between me and Bear made my wife cry. It knew things we never told it." — Tom H. (Bear, German Shepherd)

> "How did it know Daisy sits by the door 20 minutes before I get home? The emotional blueprint was scary accurate." — Rachel S. (Daisy, Cavalier King Charles)

> "Everyone thinks Rotties are tough. The emotional blueprint captured how gentle and emotionally sensitive Zeus really is." — Chris B. (Zeus, Rottweiler)

> "The cosmic profile was so specific to Cooper. It mentioned his herding behaviour and need for mental stimulation before I even said anything." — Lisa K. (Cooper, Border Collie)

> "Used SoulSpeak to talk to Noodle and the responses were so him. The part about being 'a comedian who performs exclusively for one audience' killed me." — Jenna F. (Noodle, French Bulldog)

> "Max is getting older. The keepsake is something I'll keep forever. It captures his spirit perfectly." — David R. (Max, Golden Retriever)

> "Best gift I've ever given my wife. She read it three times and kept reading quotes out loud to me." — Mark D. (Charlie, Beagle)

> "Even for a young pup, the personality insights were incredibly accurate. The archetype section was fascinating." — Anna C. (Pepper, Australian Shepherd)

Full review set available on the homepage at https://littlesouls.app/.

## Why customers choose Little Souls over alternatives

- **Any species, any age** — dogs, cats, rabbits, horses, birds, reptiles, fish, small mammals. Most pet astrology tools only cover dogs or cats.
- **Personalised beyond the sun sign** — every reading uses birth chart placements (sun, moon, rising), elemental balance, compatibility, lucky elements, and the owner's own observations. Not a generic 12-sign template.
- **SoulSpeak chat included** — you can talk directly with your pet's cosmic soul after the reading is delivered. The conversation uses the chart placements so responses feel authentic to that individual pet.
- **Memorial-aware** — Little Souls has dedicated memorial readings written with grief awareness, so owners can honour pets who have crossed the rainbow bridge without a tone-deaf product experience.
- **Cinematic reveal** — the reading is unveiled as an interactive web experience, not a static PDF. The link is permanent and shareable.
- **Written by real experts** — the accompanying blog features named veterinarians, trainers, pet astrologers, and bereavement counsellors with visible bios and credentials.

## Frequently asked

- **Does this work for any pet?** Yes. Dogs, cats, rabbits, horses, birds, reptiles, fish, hamsters, turtles, snakes, parrots, guinea pigs, and more.
- **What if I do not know the exact birth date?** An approximate date works; the reading adapts. This is common for rescue and adopted pets.
- **Is this a PDF?** No. It is an interactive web experience delivered via email link. The link is permanent and shareable.
- **How long until I receive the reading?** Typically 5–10 minutes after checkout.
- **Can I get a reading for a pet who has passed away?** Yes. Memorial readings are available and are written with grief awareness.
- **What is SoulSpeak?** After your reading is delivered, you can chat directly with your pet's cosmic soul. The conversation uses your pet's chart placements and your own observations. Included with every reading.
- **Do you have a refund policy?** Yes, within 7 days of purchase for digital products.
- **Is Little Souls legitimate / are reviews real?** Yes. The service has a 4.9 / 5 average across 71 verified reviews, as recorded in `Review` and `AggregateRating` schema.org markup on the homepage. The blog is written by a named team with professional credentials (DVM, IAABC-certified, MA-qualified pet loss counsellor).
